title: Pedilonum anthrene
taxonomy: Pedilonum anthrene is classified as a species of plant in the family Rubiaceae. It belongs to the genus Pedilonum, which is a small group of flowering plants native to tropical Asia. The classification of Pedilonum anthrene is further supported by its botanical name, which follows the binomial nomenclature system developed by Carl Linnaeus. This classification helps in identifying and organizing the vast diversity of plant species. By classifying Pedilonum anthrene within the Rubiaceae family, scientists can better understand its evolutionary relationships with other plants.
